# Patterns that MUST appear in baseline.py after both
# upstream-refactor.patch and fork-flag.patch are applied. Mirrors the
# FR-14 patches/asserts/<patch>.txt convention. One pattern per line,
# fixed-string match. Lines starting with `#` are comments.

# From the upstream refactor (head of file).
def _existing_message
upstream existing behavior (refactored)
def cmd_existing(args, *, verbose=False)

# From the fork patch (tail of file).
def cmd_new_flag
nadia fork: --new-flag invoked

# Unchanged context that must still be present.
def main(argv=None)
if __name__ == "__main__":
